summary: CBP retweet of a DHS spot captioned 'Run with us.' Color-graded vertical video with slow-motion close-ups of a Border Patrol agent's gear, a night scene with a vehicle on fire, and agents running toward a crowd, ending on a title card reading 'CBP.GOV/CAREERS'. Metadata indicates no audio track.

script.scene: Extreme close-up, shallow focus, color graded, of a camo-clad agent's shoulder showing a 'U.S. BORDER PATROL' / 'BORTAC' patch and a radio antenna; teal-and-tan tone.
Dark night street: a silhouetted agent in a marked 'POLICE'/'HSI' vest runs toward a vehicle on fire, with lens flares and orange glow.
Daytime scene, handheld: an agent in camo restrains a person in a hoodie against vehicles; saturated tone.
Wide shot from behind an agent in a marked vest running down a street toward a building and a gathered crowd; desaturated grade.
Final title card: backlit silhouette of an agent in haze with 'CBP.GOV/CAREERS' across the frame.

notable_text: CBP.GOV/CAREERS; U.S. BORDER PATROL; BORTAC; tweet: 'Run with us.'
